operator_state.local_only_disclaimer: production release=false; live connector=false; human acceptance=HUMAN_REQUIRED

action.policy_reason: High-risk or external writeback action requires owner approval before execution.
action.rollback_note: Mock/local action only: no real external side effect. Compensate by recording a correcting Claim/Action and audit entry.

claims.resolution_guide: Attach an Evidence Bundle with at least one artifact ref, then request owner approval.

evidence.insufficient_guidance: Insufficient: no Evidence Bundle, zero artifact refs, empty search result, or unsupported source. Attach eligible evidence before approval.

human_required.expected_evidence: Acceptance note with screenshots/recording, or rejection note with issue list.
human_required.release_impact: Blocks full VS-1 main implementation and operator-accepted VS0 claim; does not invalidate AI-verifiable EVUX governance PASS.
human_required.required_human_action: JiYong/Tars completes the local UI walkthrough and records accept or reject.
human_required.why_ai_cannot_verify: Human operator acceptance is subjective and requires JiYong/Tars to judge whether the local UI is understandable and controllable.

operator_state.local_only_disclaimer: production release=false; live connector=false; human acceptance=HUMAN_REQUIRED

action.policy_reason: High-risk or external writeback action requires owner approval before execution.
action.rollback_note: Mock/local action only: no real external side effect. Compensate by recording a correcting Claim/Action and audit entry.

claims.resolution_guide: Attach an Evidence Bundle with at least one artifact ref, then request owner approval.

evidence.insufficient_guidance: Insufficient: no Evidence Bundle, zero artifact refs, empty search result, or unsupported source. Attach eligible evidence before approval.

scenario_results.notes: UI exposes nine visible Artifact/Search/Evidence/Claim/Action/Dry-run/Approval/Execution/Audit steps, not only one opaque run button.
Artifact step shows artifact ID, checksum, source, derived status, evidence refs, and audit refs.
Search step shows query, result snippet, search snapshot ID, and evidence eligibility.
Evidence step shows supporting evidence and insufficient-evidence guidance.
Claim step shows Draft, Evidence-backed, and Approved states clearly.
Zero-evidence Claim approval is denied with CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED and resolution guidance.
Action Card shows diff, expected impact, evidence, policy, risk, approval state, mock/local boundary, and rollback/compensation note.
Execution step shows mock_connector_calls=1 and real_external_http_calls=0.
Audit step shows artifact/search/evidence/claim/action/approval/execution events and successful audit verification.
UI states local VS0 proof only and does not claim production release, live connector readiness, or human acceptance.
Existing EVUX governance remains PASS with 14 AI rows and 2 HUMAN_REQUIRED rows.
Browser timeout cannot become clean PASS; clean PASS requires clean_browser_exit=true, chrome_exit_code=0, and chrome_timeout=false.
JiYong/Tars must use the UI and record accept or reject.
